data.body:
I think it depends on your age.

As a young lad, I'd want to swerve the "arl arse" pubs (e.g. The White Star in Rainford Gardens in Liverpool) on account of them being full of "arl arses".

Whereas today, I would very much choose to frequent such establishments, given that I'm now an "arl arse".
